stonetop.summary: Hired muscle protecting a merchant caravan on the long road north.

system.concept: Hired muscle protecting a merchant caravan on the long road north.
system.description: Much of the way between Lygos and Marshedge runs through trackless wilds, without the protection of the Makers' Roads. Bandits, beasts, and Hillfolk are all a threat, and plenty of would-be clients would as soon rob a merchant as trade fairly. So merchants hire guards — and when danger looms, they hope they hired well.
